I mean actually my preference is to have a separate developer blog and I think almost all of your Webflow properties have so much clout as far as SEO goes where like it doesn't matter.

And I think that was our plan before, too.
Like, we have, I can show you.

Right.
And for now, we'll prioritize the stuff that goes on the blog.
Well, I think it really is up to you guys, but like, we'll support wherever we can of like, where the developer blog will be and when that'll actually go live.
Does that work?

Spaces, and then you can take it from there, right?
Yeah, I mean, if you can do that, that would be great.
But I don't know.

And then she would kind of like extract them back to the main one, the main blog.
I think giving an outsider access to your like www.com one, I think didn't seem like that was something that was on the table.

So, so it's not necessarily one.
And so I'm just wondering if.
I guess in that case, I'm not actually sure what the next step would be.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content strategy and implementation for Webflow's developer-focused content across various platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages are ready; next step is publishing on Webflow's site](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Decision made to start with main blog content while finalizing developers.webflow.com strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create Webflow project for integration pages, with potential access to be granted](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Clarified that various Webflow properties (blog, marketplace, etc.) are separate sites, offering flexibility in content placement](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)

## Topics

### Content Platform Strategy

  - [Initial plan: publish on developers.webflow.com](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Shifted to consider main blog for better discoverability and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Final decision: flexibility to publish on both main blog and developers.webflow.com](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Short-term plan: publish 2 articles/week on main blog to test quality and performance](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Long-term: develop separate developer blog on developers.webflow.com](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

### Integration Pages

  - [60 pages created, with some adjustments needed](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Colin and Vivian (Webflow) approved current versions](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=17.0)
  - [GrowthX capable of producing up to 200 pages with copy](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Next step: determine process for publishing on Webflow's site](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Access and Implementation

  - [Webflow properties (blog, marketplace, developers) are separate sites with different domains](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create Webflow project for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Kirat to investigate granting GrowthX access to relevant Webflow spaces](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Alternative: clone blog site into GrowthX workspace (already set up with Vivian)](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Content Development

  - [Colin and Luke (PMM team) trained on technical content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [GrowthX has mapped out topics for both blog and developer site](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Plan to prioritize blog content initially, then shift focus to developer site](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kirat to identify owners of Webflow properties and explore granting GrowthX access](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Jason to create Webflow project for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin building out integration pages and prepare blog content](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Kirat to follow up with Vivian regarding blog site cloning and workspace setup](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Team to finalize content distribution strategy between main blog and future developer blog](https://fathom.video/share/_5PGphQ4Ept_NUCXMFgbZxB3UBk2iGn7?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)

action_items.description: Create new Webflow project for integration pages. Begin building out content
Find owner of developers.webflow.com access. Coordinate w/ Vivian re: giving Jason's team access to relevant Webflow sites (developers, templates, etc.)
Tag Kirat in existing thread w/ Vivian re: blog site cloning, workspace setup
